title: 8 Inch Large Capacity Mortar and Pestle Set - One Mortar and Two Pestels - Natural 5 Cups Unpolished Heavy Granite for Apothecary Kitchen
description:
About this item
8 Inch large mortar and pestle, This set of granite pieces is extraordinarily large. 5 CUPS ! Do not feel limited by the mortar capacity !
Two pestles, Use the larger 7 inch pestle to CRUSH the tougher ingredients and the standard 6 inch one for the grinding and muddling action.
Creates an authentic taste and texture that can't be duplicated with mixers and food processors; Deep mortar bowl and pestle are designed to crush, grind and powder herbs, dry spices, garlic, nuts, coffee, muddle drinks, human or pet medication, guacamole and more... and make spice blends
Easy To Use, Easy To Clean: Manual grinding doesn’t have to be a sweaty task.
Food-safe, no BPA, elegant, durable, easy-to-clean, no residual taste, low-maintenance; Rinse with warm water and air dry
reviews_5s:
I like how long the large pestle is. It lets my hand clear the top of the mortar without smacking it regularly. The capacity of the mortar seems perfect! I couldn't see a smaller one being very useful which makes me feel sorry for people who order 2 cup capacity sets. It has held up well after fairly heavy use and is well seasoned.

If you want to use both of the pestles you will need to break them both in when you're first season it. It's a very labor intensive process, but it's a great opportunity to learn how to use your new tool!When I got this item, I was shocked how big it was. Which is great! Good quality.After struggling to make "proper" pesto with my very small motar and pestle, I bit the bullet and bought this giant. I LOVE it! (I rarely use the little guy anymore, even for a handful of smoked peppercorns.) And it is beautiful! I have porcelain counter tops, and it is sitting proudly on one of them. No need to find a spot in the cupboard for this beauty.We really like the larger size of this mortar bowl because the ones available in stores were too small for our needs.Works well, and cleans up easily. I decided not to use soap on/in it I am only cleaning with hot water and if needed I will grind some rice in it.Very sturdy and unlike other reviews didn't see any flakes coming off. Good valueFunctional and large enough for making fresh guacamole.Play Video
Heavy duty, thick, sturdy, deep and good looking 😍 very happy with my purchase!

1. cure it with rice and salt
2. rinse (and brush) it under running hot water (without soap)
3. season it with fresh ginger, garlic, salt, whole black pepper
4. rinse (and brush) it under running hot water (without soap) until the water inside the mortar looks clear, then it's good to use!
Will cure it again periodically for maintenance.This product is a good size, i was pleasantly surprised. Even when you know the dimensions sometimes you're surprised when the product arrives - in this case everything was better than expected. Works very well and i'm very pleased with this product.Very heavy duty
